ques: Check the latest articles on ESPN for updates on any trades that occurred in the NBA within the past 2 days.
answer: ESPN's "NBA trade tracker" (updated ~7h ago) and related articles report several NBA trades within the past 2 days. June 25: the biggest deal — Charlotte Hornets traded LaMelo Ball (and Josh Green) to the Minnesota Timberwolves for Naz Reid, a 2033 unprotected first-round pick, three first-round pick swaps (2028/2029/2030), and three second-round picks. June 24 (draft day): Detroit Pistons traded Isaiah Stewart to the Memphis Grizzlies for three future second-round picks, plus numerous draft-pick swaps (Lakers→Mavericks No. 56, Rockets→Clippers No. 55, Knicks→Pistons No. 53, Clippers→Hawks No. 52, Magic→Wizards No. 46, Bulls→Pacers No. 38 for Kam Jones, Thunder/Heat second-rounder swap). June 23 (pre-draft): a four-team Knicks-Mavs-Cavs-Suns trade and multiple first-round pick deals. (The Giannis Antetokounmpo–to–Heat and Julius Randle–to–Nets blockbusters were ~3 days ago, just outside the 2-day window.)
